Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Weihao Technology.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Weihao Technology Co., Ltd. presents the classic profile of an asset-light IC (Integrated Circuit) design house or 'fabless' semiconductor firm. Despite its broad business scope claiming the 'manufacture' of IC chips and electronic products, its registered address is critically revealing: '8th Floor, Building 8, Digital Valley, IC Park, Jiangbei New Area'. It is physically impossible to house a semiconductor fabrication plant (Fab) on the 8th floor of an office building. However, unlike empty shells, it maintains a robust paid-in capital of 10.85 million RMB and a highly qualified workforce of 35 insured employees. This firmly establishes the entity as a specialized R&D hub, focusing entirely on IC chip design (fabless model), software development, and the integration of automation control systems, outsourcing all physical wafer fabrication and chip packaging to dedicated foundries.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 70)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / FABLESS R&D & DESIGN NODE
